name: bizprint
description: Connect Claude to BizPrint Cloud Print API. Send print jobs, manage printers and stations, and monitor print job status through natural language.

tools.name: list_printers
tools.description: List all configured printers with their settings

tools.name: get_printer
tools.description: Get details for a specific printer by ID

tools.name: list_stations
tools.description: List all print stations and their status

tools.name: get_station
tools.description: Get details for a specific station by ID

tools.name: create_print_job
tools.description: Send a document URL to a printer

tools.name: get_print_job
tools.description: Check the status of a print job

tools.name: list_print_jobs
tools.description: List all print jobs with pagination

bizprint_public_key.title: BizPrint API Public Key
bizprint_public_key.description: Your BizPrint API public key from print.bizswoop.app/applications

bizprint_secret_key.title: BizPrint API Secret Key
bizprint_secret_key.description: Your BizPrint API secret key from print.bizswoop.app/applications
